identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a thumb-friendly, visually striking training companion that motivates through data clarity and bold aesthetics.

tech_stack.icons: Lucide React Native or Expo Vector Icons

layout_strategy.safe_area: Always wrap main content in SafeAreaView

buttons.primary: bg-lime-400 rounded-full px-8 py-4 active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 border border-zinc-700 rounded-full px-6 py-3

cards.base: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-lg
cards.highlight: bg-zinc-900 border border-lime-400/30 rounded-2xl p-5 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(190,242,100,0.1)]
cards.glass: bg-zinc-900/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-5

inputs.base: bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-zinc-100 placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:border-lime-400

visual_enhancers.gradients: Use subtle linear gradients for card backgrounds (e.g., zinc-900 to zinc-950). Avoid full-screen gradients.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px borders (zinc-800) are mandatory for all cards to define hierarchy in dark mode.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Glow effects for active elements (lime-400 glow).
visual_enhancers.textures: Optional subtle noise texture on background for depth.

universal_guidelines: ALL TEXT MUST BE IN ITALIAN.
Use React Native primitives: View, Text, Pressable, ScrollView, FlatList, Image.
DO NOT use HTML tags (div, span, h1, etc.).
Ensure all touch targets are at least 44x44 points.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headers (H1-H3) and 'Inter' for body text.
Data numbers must be Monospace (JetBrains Mono or similar) for alignment.
Dark Mode is the ONLY mode. Hardcode colors if necessary, or use dark-only theme config.
Interactive elements must have active states (opacity change or scale).
Charts should use the defined functional colors for zones.
Add 'data-testid' prop to all interactive elements.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a React Native Expo app. Use the provided colors and typography to build a high-contrast, 'Garmin-on-steroids' dark mode interface. Focus on the Dashboard first: it should look like a tactical command center for the runner. Use the 'Bento Grid' layout for the home screen widgets. Ensure the 'Training Plan' view is clear and skimmable.
